phrases.intent_en: Ask where the bike rental kiosk is
phrases.text_local: Onde fica o quiosque de aluguel de bicicletas?
phrases.pronunciation: OHNG-dih FEE-kuh AW KEEOHSH-kih DIH uh-loo-GEHL DIH bee-seek-LEH-tuhsh?
phrases.cultural_note: Rental kiosks operate on a first-come, first-served basis during daylight hours.

likely_response.local: Pergunte ao alugador de bicicletas ou siga as placas para a Ciclovia do Mondego.
likely_response.pronunciation: peh-ruh-GOONNG-tih OW uh-loo-guh-DOHR DIH bee-seek-LEH-tuhsh OHW SEE-guh UHSH PLAH-kuhsh PUH-ruh AH seek-loo-VEEUH DOO moong-DEH-goo.
likely_response.translation_en: Ask the bike rental attendant or follow the signs to the Mondego Cycle Path.

responses.english: Ask the bike rental attendant or follow the signs to the Mondego Cycle Path.
responses.phonetic: peh-ruh-GOONNG-tih OW uh-loo-guh-DOHR DIH bee-seek-LEH-tuhsh OHW SEE-guh UHSH PLAH-kuhsh PUH-ruh AH seek-loo-VEEUH DOO moong-DEH-goo.
responses.local: Pergunte ao alugador de bicicletas ou siga as placas para a Ciclovia do Mondego.

phrases.intent_en: Ask where the Mondego cycle path starts
phrases.text_local: Podem dizer onde começa a ciclovia do Mondego?
phrases.pronunciation: PAW-dayng dee-ZEHR OHNG-dih koo-MEH-suh AH seek-loo-VEEUH DOO moong-DEH-goo?
phrases.cultural_note: The cycle path runs parallel to the river for several kilometers.

likely_response.local: Siga as placas para a Ciclovia do Mondego.
likely_response.pronunciation: SEE-guh UHSH PLAH-kuhsh PUH-ruh AH seek-loo-VEEUH DOO moong-DEH-goo.
likely_response.translation_en: Follow the signs to the Mondego Cycle Path.

responses.english: Follow the signs to the Mondego Cycle Path.
responses.phonetic: SEE-guh UHSH PLAH-kuhsh PUH-ruh AH seek-loo-VEEUH DOO moong-DEH-goo.
responses.local: Siga as placas para a Ciclovia do Mondego.

phrases.text_local: Onde fica o Jardim da Sereia?
phrases.pronunciation: OHNG-dih FEE-kuh AW zhuh-ruh-DEEN DUH seh-RAYUH?

likely_response.local: Siga as placas para o Jardim da Sereia.
likely_response.pronunciation: SEE-guh UHSH PLAH-kuhsh PUH-ruh AW zhuh-ruh-DEEN DUH seh-RAYUH.
likely_response.translation_en: Follow the signs to the Mermaid Garden.

responses.english: Follow the signs to the Mermaid Garden.
responses.phonetic: SEE-guh UHSH PLAH-kuhsh PUH-ruh AW zhuh-ruh-DEEN DUH seh-RAYUH.
responses.local: Siga as placas para o Jardim da Sereia.

phrases.intent_en: Ask where the Santa Clara Bridge is
phrases.text_local: Onde fica a Ponte de Santa Clara?
phrases.pronunciation: ON-jee FEE-kuh ah PON-chee jee SAN-tuh KLAH-rah?
phrases.cultural_note: The Santa Clara Bridge is a historic iron bridge in Coimbra, a key landmark across the Mondego River.

likely_response.local: Na Marginal do Mondego, junto ao rio.
likely_response.pronunciation: NUH muh-ruh-zhee-NAHL DOO moong-DEH-goo, ZHOONNG-too OW REEOO.
likely_response.translation_en: On the Mondego River Promenade, next to the river.

responses.english: On the Mondego River Promenade, next to the river.
responses.phonetic: NUH muh-ruh-zhee-NAHL DOO moong-DEH-goo, ZHOONNG-too OW REEOO.
responses.local: Na Marginal do Mondego, junto ao rio.

phrases.intent_en: Ask where the riverside bike path starts
phrases.text_local: Onde começa exatamente a ciclovia à beira do rio?
phrases.cultural_note: Locals refer to the path simply as 'Ciclovia do Mondego'.

likely_response.local: Bom dia, começa junto à ponte.
likely_response.pronunciation: BOHNG DEEUH, koo-MEH-suh ZHOONNG-too AH POHNG-tih.
likely_response.translation_en: Good morning, it starts near the bridge.

responses.english: Good morning, it starts near the bridge.
responses.phonetic: BOHNG DEEUH, koo-MEH-suh ZHOONNG-too AH POHNG-tih.
responses.local: Bom dia, começa junto à ponte.

phrases.intent_en: Ask where the Mondego viewpoint is
phrases.text_local: Scusi, onde fica o Miradouro do Mondego?
phrases.pronunciation: skoo-ZEE, OHNG-dih FEE-kuh AW mee-ruh-DOHW-roo DOO moong-DEH-goo?
phrases.cultural_note: The viewpoint offers panoramic views of the river and city.

likely_response.translation_en: Going up the hill, on the right.

responses.english: Going up the hill, on the right.

phrases.intent_en: Ask where the Mermaid Garden is
phrases.text_local: Onde fica o Jardim da Sereia?
phrases.pronunciation: OHNG-dih FEE-kuh AW zhuh-ruh-DEEN DUH seh-RAYUH?
phrases.cultural_note: The garden features a prominent mermaid statue overlooking the river.

likely_response.local: Siga as placas para o Jardim da Sereia.
likely_response.pronunciation: SEE-guh UHSH PLAH-kuhsh PUH-ruh AW zhuh-ruh-DEEN DUH seh-RAYUH.
likely_response.translation_en: Follow the signs to the Mermaid Garden.

responses.english: Follow the signs to the Mermaid Garden.
responses.phonetic: SEE-guh UHSH PLAH-kuhsh PUH-ruh AW zhuh-ruh-DEEN DUH seh-RAYUH.
responses.local: Siga as placas para o Jardim da Sereia.

phrases.intent_en: Ask where the river viewpoint is
phrases.text_local: Qual é o caminho mais rápido para o miradouro?
phrases.pronunciation: KWAHL EH AW kuh-MEE-nyoo MEYESH RAH-pee-doo PUH-ruh AW mee-ruh-DOHW-roo?
phrases.cultural_note: The viewpoint offers panoramic views of the historic city center.

likely_response.local: Siga as placas para o Miradouro do Mondego.
likely_response.pronunciation: SEE-guh UHSH PLAH-kuhsh PUH-ruh AW mee-ruh-DOHW-roo DOO moong-DEH-goo.
likely_response.translation_en: Follow the signs to the Mondego viewpoint.

responses.english: Follow the signs to the Mondego viewpoint.
responses.phonetic: SEE-guh UHSH PLAH-kuhsh PUH-ruh AW mee-ruh-DOHW-roo DOO moong-DEH-goo.
responses.local: Siga as placas para o Miradouro do Mondego.

phrases.intent_en: Ask where the bike rental kiosk is
phrases.text_local: Onde fica o quiosque de aluguer de bicicletas?
phrases.pronunciation: OHNG-dih FEE-kuh AW KEEOHSH-kih DIH uh-loo-GEHR DIH bee-seek-LEH-tuhsh?
phrases.cultural_note: Bike rentals are popular along the Ciclovia do Mondego, a scenic riverside cycling route.

likely_response.local: Na Marginal do Mondego, junto à ciclovia.
likely_response.pronunciation: NUH muh-ruh-zhee-NAHL DOO moong-DEH-goo, ZHOONNG-too AH seek-loo-VEEUH.
likely_response.translation_en: On the Mondego River Promenade, next to the bike path.

responses.english: On the Mondego River Promenade, next to the bike path.
responses.phonetic: NUH muh-ruh-zhee-NAHL DOO moong-DEH-goo, ZHOONNG-too AH seek-loo-VEEUH.
responses.local: Na Marginal do Mondego, junto à ciclovia.

phrases.intent_en: Ask where the Santa Clara Bridge is
phrases.text_local: Podem indicar a localização da Ponte de Santa Clara?
phrases.pronunciation: PAW-dayng een-dee-KAHR AH loo-kuh-lee-zuh-SOWN DUH POHNG-tih DIH SAHNNG-tuh KLAH-ruh?
phrases.cultural_note: The bridge is a historic landmark connecting the university to the riverfront.

likely_response.local: Siga as placas para a Ponte de Santa Clara.
likely_response.pronunciation: SEE-guh UHSH PLAH-kuhsh PUH-ruh AH POHNG-tih DIH SAHNNG-tuh KLAH-ruh.
likely_response.translation_en: Follow the signs to Santa Clara Bridge.

responses.english: Follow the signs to Santa Clara Bridge.
responses.phonetic: SEE-guh UHSH PLAH-kuhsh PUH-ruh AH POHNG-tih DIH SAHNNG-tuh KLAH-ruh.
responses.local: Siga as placas para a Ponte de Santa Clara.

phrases.intent_en: Ask where the Mermaid Garden is
phrases.text_local: Scusi, onde fica o Jardim da Sereia?
phrases.pronunciation: skoo-ZEE, OHNG-dih FEE-kuh AW zhuh-ruh-DEEN DUH seh-RAYUH?
phrases.cultural_note: Jardim da Sereia is a romantic garden with a mermaid statue, popular for walks.

likely_response.translation_en: On the other side of the bridge.

responses.english: On the other side of the bridge.
